changes.description: New monthly NAV: Class F-I $32.08 (-0.62% vs Feb 28, 2026 $32.28). Series II Transactional NAV $233.3M (+12.7%). Outstanding shares 7,259,274. April 1 subs $52.4M.

New monthly NAV: Class I $29.96 (-1.06% vs Feb $30.28) reflecting Jan 1, 2026 methodology change (capitalize/amortize financing/acquisition costs over up to 10 years; $14.4M unamortized at Mar 31). Total Transactional NAV $7,230.7M (+2.87%).

New monthly NAV: Class I/D/S $24.9176 (-0.03% vs Feb $24.9252). Aggregate NAV $3,130.0M (+12.5%). April subs finalized $313.1M (12.56M shares; Class I 10.53M for $262.5M). April distribution $0.20830/share gross. May/June 2026 distributions declared at $0.20830/share.

Item 2.03: Acquired BCP Renaissance Parent / BCP Renaissance LLC (49.9% Rover Pipeline). Rover Credit Agreement: senior secured Term Loan B, $1.09B outstanding as of Mar 31, 2026. SOFR+2.25% (1.0% floor). Maturity Oct 31, 2031. Interest rate swap $750M with Morgan Stanley fixed at 3.7566% through Jun 30, 2026. Non-recourse to Fund except for collateral.

New monthly NAV: Class I-1 $32.15 (+1.23% vs Feb $31.76). Other classes — A-1a $31.82, A-1b $31.86, A-1c $31.89, F-1 $31.89, X $32.91. SP+ INFRA cumulative capital raised $1,292.4M (April +$100.5M). April Fund-only subs $65.0M (Class I-1 136,188 units / $4.32M). March distribution Class I-1 $0.2400/unit (record Mar 31, payable May 7, 2026).

Item 5.03: Third Amended & Restated LPA — authorized Class Z series (Series D-2, I-2, S-2 of Class Z); cancelled unissued Class D-2/I-2/S-2 Units. Second A&R Investment Advisory Agreement also entered.
